narrative:
Jefferson Twp township has 909 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.6 percentage points.
